title: HyperfocalManifest
description: Agent output manifest for the self-managed Postgres RL environment

sourceInstanceId.description: EC2 instance ID of the source (original) Postgres node

targetInstanceId.description: EC2 instance ID of the target (new, patched) Postgres node

workloadInstanceId.description: EC2 instance ID of the workload driver

targetHost.description: Private IP or DNS hostname of the target EC2 instance

patchDescription.description: Brief description of the feature implemented in the Postgres source

pgBinaryPath.description: Absolute path on the target EC2 to the compiled postgres binary
